name: EvidenceRequest
description: Request body for submitting evidence to contest a dispute. May include file references, textual explanations, and shipping/tracking details.

files.description: Array of file identifiers uploaded via the Files API to attach as documentary evidence.

explanation.description: Textual explanation of the merchant's position and why the dispute should be decided in the merchant's favor.

tracking_number.description: Shipment tracking number demonstrating that the order was delivered as expected.

shipping_carrier.description: Name of the shipping carrier used for the disputed order.

customer_communication.description: Description or summary of communications with the customer regarding the disputed order.

refund_policy_disclosure.description: Description of the merchant's refund policy as shown to the customer at the time of purchase.
